narrative:
Ballville C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 527 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.6 percentage points.
